title: Difficult Conversation Script (5-Step Framework)
use_when: Difficult Conversation Script (5-Step Framework). Use when the user needs a product workflow for stakeholder management related to difficult conversation script (5-step framework). Trigger terms: coaching, communication, conflict-resolution, stakeholder-management.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Difficult Conversation Script (5-Step Framework) when the request is mainly technical implementation, analytics modeling, or UX critique; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Difficult Conversation Script (5-Step Framework) stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
framework_fit: Difficult Conversation Script (5-Step Framework) fits Stakeholder Communication work in the Align lifecycle when the user needs Difficult Conversation Script (5-Step Framework) stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Difficult Conversation Script (5-Step Framework) stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner without tying recommendations to the user's Align stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Difficult Conversation Script (5-Step Framework) as generic Stakeholder Communication advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Difficult Conversation Script (5-Step Framework) when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $difficult-conversation-script-5-step-framework to turn this difficult context into a decision-ready Difficult Conversation Script (5-Step Framework) stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner.
examples.expected_artifact: Difficult Conversation Script (5-Step Framework) stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
